title: CLIP
fullTitle: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
coreQuestion: How can natural language supervision train transferable visual representations?
contribution: Trains image and text encoders jointly so images and prompts can be compared in one embedding space.

title: Flamingo
fullTitle: Few-Shot Learning With Multimodal Language Models
coreQuestion: How can a model perform few-shot visual-language tasks with interleaved image and text inputs?
contribution: Connects vision features to a language model for multimodal in-context learning.

title: BLIP-2
fullTitle: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training With Frozen Image Encoders and Large Language Models
coreQuestion: How can frozen vision encoders and frozen LLMs be connected efficiently?
contribution: Introduces a lightweight bridge module between vision encoders and LLMs.

title: LLaVA
coreQuestion: How can visual-language models learn to follow image-grounded instructions?
contribution: Builds visual instruction data and aligns a vision encoder with an LLM for image chat.

title: LLaVA 1.5
fullTitle: Improved Baselines With Visual Instruction Tuning
coreQuestion: What practical recipe makes visual instruction tuning stronger and reproducible?
contribution: Improves LLaVA's training recipe and establishes a stronger open VLM baseline.

title: Adapters
coreQuestion: How can models adapt to new tasks without updating all parameters?
contribution: Adds small trainable adapter modules while keeping the base model mostly fixed.

title: Prefix Tuning
fullTitle: Prefix-Tuning: Optimizing Continuous Prompts for Generation
coreQuestion: Can trainable prefixes steer a frozen language model?
contribution: Learns continuous prefix vectors for generation tasks without full fine-tuning.

title: P-Tuning v2
coreQuestion: How can prompt tuning work robustly across model sizes and tasks?
contribution: Uses deep prompt tuning to improve prompt-based PEFT performance.

title: LoRA
fullTitle: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
coreQuestion: Can low-rank updates approximate full fine-tuning for large models?
contribution: Injects trainable low-rank matrices into Transformer layers.

title: QLoRA
coreQuestion: How can larger models be fine-tuned on limited GPU memory?
contribution: Combines quantized base models with LoRA adapters for memory-efficient training.

title: Self-Instruct
coreQuestion: How can instruction data be bootstrapped when human labels are scarce?
contribution: Generates synthetic instructions to expand instruction-following data.

title: InstructGPT
fullTitle: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions With Human Feedback
coreQuestion: How can human feedback align model behavior with user instructions?
contribution: Uses SFT, reward modeling, and RLHF to improve instruction following.

title: DPO
coreQuestion: Can preference alignment be done without explicit reward model training?
contribution: Optimizes directly on preference pairs using a simpler objective than RLHF pipelines.

title: Constitutional AI
fullTitle: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness From AI Feedback
coreQuestion: Can AI feedback guided by principles improve harmlessness and safety behavior?
contribution: Uses constitutional principles and AI feedback for safer model behavior.

title: ImageBind
fullTitle: One Embedding Space To Bind Them All
coreQuestion: Can many modalities be aligned into one shared embedding space?
contribution: Extends alignment beyond image-text to audio, depth, thermal, and sensor modalities.
